{"target_error_category": "Preposition", "corrected_sentence": "I live in a small town called Grycksbo and I've been part of Unga Kris volunteering programs since the summer of 2010.", "task": {"type": "vocabulary_fill", "instruction_en": "Read the email below and fill in the blanks with the correct prepositions from the word bank. Each word is used at least once. Use each preposition only once.", "content_en": {"context_text": "Hi Maria,

I hope you're doing well! I wanted to tell you about my life in Grycksbo. I moved here last year and I’ve really enjoyed living in the **_of_** quiet countryside. I’m part of a local volunteer group called Unga Kris, which works with children in nearby schools. We started our program in the **_summer_** of 2010, so we’re celebrating our 10th anniversary this year!

Last month, we organized a fun activity for the kids during the **_afternoon_** of the school fair. It was held in the **_garden_** of the community center. Many families came to see the games and crafts.

One of the volunteers, Lena, has been with us since the **_beginning_**. She’s been a big help. Every year, we plan events in the **_spring_** and **_fall_**. This year, we’re organizing a picnic in the **_park_** next week.

I’d love to hear from you soon. Let me know if you want to visit the **_town_** sometime. Maybe we could meet up in the **_evening_**?

Best wishes,
Anna", "items": [{"question_en": "I moved here last year and I’ve really enjoyed living in the ___ quiet countryside.", "options_en": null, "student_answer_en": "**_of_**"}, {"question_en": "We started our program in the ___ of 2010, so we’re celebrating our 10th anniversary this year!", "options_en": null, "student_answer_en": "**_summer_**"}, {"question_en": "It was held in the ___ of the school fair.", "options_en": null, "student_answer_en": "**_afternoon_**"}, {"question_en": "It was held in the ___ of the school fair.", "options_en": null, "student_answer_en": "**_garden_**"}, {"question_en": "Many families came to see the games and crafts.", "options_en": null, "student_answer_en": ""}, {"question_en": "One of the volunteers, Lena, has been with us since the ___.", "options_en": null, "student_answer_en": "**_beginning_**"}, {"question_en": "Every year, we plan events in the ___ and ___.", "options_en": null, "student_answer_en": "**_spring_** / **_fall_**"}, {"question_en": "This year, we’re organizing a picnic in the ___ next week.", "options_en": null, "student_answer_en": "**_park_**"}, {"question_en": "Maybe we could meet up in the ___?", "options_en": null, "student_answer_en": "**_evening_**"}, {"question_en": "Let me know if you want to visit the ___ sometime.", "options_en": null, "student_answer_en": "**_town_**"}], "word_bank": ["of", "summer", "afternoon", "garden", "beginning", "spring", "fall", "park", "evening", "town"]}}}

{"target_error_category": "Subject-Verb Agreement", "corrected_sentence": "Science practically improves our lives.", "task": {"type": "vocabulary_fill", "instruction_en": "Read the email below and fill in the blanks with words from the word bank. Use each word only once. Pay attention to subject-verb agreement as you choose the correct form of each verb.", "content_en": {"context_text": "Dear Alex,

I hope you're doing well. I wanted to share some thoughts about how science **_improves_** our daily lives in so many ways. From medical advancements that **_save_** lives to technology that **_connects_** people across the globe, progress **_continues_** at an incredible pace. 

One area where science **_has made_** a huge difference is in education. Online learning platforms **_offer_** flexible schedules and personalized lessons. Students **_benefit_** from this because they can review material at their own speed. 

Another field that **_grows_** rapidly is renewable energy. Solar panels **_generate_** clean power, reducing dependence on fossil fuels. Engineers **_design_** new systems every day to make energy more efficient. 

Of course, not everyone **_sees_** these benefits equally. Some communities **_lack_** access to modern technology. Still, the future **_looks_** bright for innovation.

Let me know what you think!

Best regards,
Jordan", "items": [{"question_en": "I wanted to share some thoughts about how science ___ our daily lives in so many ways.", "options_en": null, "student_answer_en": "**_improves_**"}, {"question_en": "From medical advancements that ___ lives to technology that ___ people across the globe, progress ___ at an incredible pace.", "options_en": null, "student_answer_en": "**_save_** / **_connects_** / **_continues_**"}, {"question_en": "One area where science ___ a huge difference is in education.", "options_en": null, "student_answer_en": "**_has made_**"}, {"question_en": "Online learning platforms ___ flexible schedules and personalized lessons.", "options_en": null, "student_answer_en": "**_offer_**"}, {"question_en": "Students ___ from this because they can review material at their own speed.", "options_en": null, "student_answer_en": "**_benefit_**"}, {"question_en": "Another field that ___ rapidly is renewable energy.", "options_en": null, "student_answer_en": "**_grows_**"}, {"question_en": "Solar panels ___ clean power, reducing dependence on fossil fuels.", "options_en": null, "student_answer_en": "**_generate_**"}, {"question_en": "Engineers ___ new systems every day to make energy more efficient.", "options_en": null, "student_answer_en": "**_design_**"}, {"question_en": "Of course, not everyone ___ these benefits equally.", "options_en": null, "student_answer_en": "**_sees_**"}, {"question_en": "Some communities ___ access to modern technology.", "options_en": null, "student_answer_en": "**_lack_**"}, {"question_en": "Still, the future ___ bright for innovation.", "options_en": null, "student_answer_en": "**_looks_**"}], "word_bank": ["improves", "save", "connects", "continues", "has made", "offer", "benefit", "grows", "generate", "design", "sees", "lack", "looks"]}}}

{"target_error_category": "Article", "corrected_sentence": "The rules of engagement are quite simple.", "task": {"type": "vocabulary_fill", "instruction_en": "Read the email below and fill in the blanks with words from the word bank. I hope this message finds you well. I'm writing to clarify some important **_rules_** of engagement within our department. These **_guidelines_** help ensure clear communication and respect among all members. The **_first_** rule is that all emails must be responded to within 24 hours. We avoid using informal **_language_** in professional contexts. Meetings should begin on time, and participants are expected to arrive **_on_** time. The **_second_** point is about confidentiality — sensitive information must not be shared outside the team. We also follow the **_company_** policy regarding data protection. When disagreements arise, we suggest mediation rather than confrontation. The **_third_** rule is about tone — always maintain a respectful and clear **_voice_**. We discourage passive-aggressive behavior. The **_fourth_** guideline concerns deadlines. Projects must be completed by the scheduled date. The **_fifth_** rule is about feedback. Constructive criticism should be given privately. The **_sixth_** point is about attendance. Regular participation helps build trust. The **_seventh_** rule is about updates. Progress should be reported weekly. The **_eighth_** guideline is about collaboration. We value teamwork above all. The **_ninth_** rule is about privacy. Personal phone calls should be avoided during work hours. The **_tenth_** point is about expectations. All employees must understand their roles. The **_eleventh_** rule is about respect. We treat each other with dignity. The **_twelfth_** guideline is about innovation. Encourage creative thinking. The **_thirteenth_** rule is about accountability. Everyone is responsible for their actions. The **_fourteenth_** point is about flexibility. Be ready to adapt to changing circumstances.

Best regards,
Manager", "items": [{"question_en": "Dear Team,

{"target_error_category": "Subject-Verb Agreement", "corrected_sentence": "My favourite sport is football. I love it so much. He is the best player in the world. A few people have told me that Messi is the best player, but I feel angry when I hear that, because that is not true. So I am looking forward to meeting my favourite player one day. It's like a dream for me.", "task": {"type": "vocabulary_fill", "instruction_en": "Read the story below about the narrator's love for football. Fill in the blanks with the correct words from the word bank. Pay close attention to subject-verb agreement and grammar usage.", "content_en": {"context_text": "My favourite sport is football. I love it so much. When I was young, I used to watch football and my favorite team is Barcelona. I used to play with my friends in the street and we **_were_** so happy doing that, and after that, we played on a football pitch like in real football. I love Cristiano Ronaldo so much. He is the best player in the world. A few people have told me that Messi is the best player, but I feel angry when I hear that, because that is not true. So I am looking forward to meeting my favourite player one day. It's like a dream for me. Last weekend, I went to a small stadium near my house. There were only ten players on the field, but they **_played_** as if they were in the Champions League. My brother said he **_was_** nervous at first, but now he says he wants to join the team. We **_watched_** the match together and cheered loudly whenever someone scored. Even though the game ended early, we **_had_** so much fun. {"target_error_category": "Others", "corrected_sentence": "The learning style is a traditional learning style that is usual in my country.", "task": {"type": "vocabulary_fill", "instruction_en": "Read the email below and fill in the blanks with words from the word bank. Each word is used at least once. Pay attention to grammar and word form.", "content_en": {"context_text": "Hi Maria,

I hope you're doing well! I wanted to share some thoughts about education in my country. The learning style here is very different from what I've seen in international schools. It's not just about memorizing facts — it's more about understanding concepts and applying them in real life. This approach is often called **_experiential learning_**, which means students learn by doing. Teachers encourage collaboration and creativity. Some subjects, like science, use hands-on experiments, while others focus on group discussions and presentations. 

One challenge is that not all schools support this method fully. Some still rely on traditional lectures and exams. However, there is growing awareness that **_active learning_** improves retention. Many educators believe that personalized instruction leads to better results. They use technology to create interactive lessons, but they also value face-to-face interaction. 

Another issue is funding. Not all regions can afford updated materials or training for teachers. Still, progress is being made. For example, some governments now offer grants for innovative teaching methods. I think this kind of education should be promoted worldwide because it prepares students for the future. After all, the world is changing fast, and we need learners who can adapt and innovate.

Let me know your thoughts!

Best regards,

I hope you're doing well. I wanted to share some thoughts about a topic we discussed last week — the risks of nuclear power. While the benefits seem appealing at first, there’s a serious downside: the dangerous weapons that countries try to own. These weapons are not just a threat to national security, but also to global peace. They exist because governments believe they need them for protection, even though possession leads to instability. The problem is that these weapons aren’t just owned by one country — they’re shared among nations, and this sharing creates a dangerous cycle. Some argue that disarmament is impossible, but history shows that change is possible when leaders choose cooperation over conflict. The United Nations has proposed treaties, but progress depends on countries taking responsibility. The serious side of nuclear power is the dangerous weapons that countries try to own, which threaten the peace in the world. We must focus on dialogue, trust-building, and long-term solutions. Without action, these weapons will continue to grow, and the future looks uncertain.

Best regards,
Jordan", "items": [{"question_en": "Dear Alex,

Also, **_balance_** is important — I try to spend time both on teams and **_individual_** activities. It’s great to learn how to work together, but I also need solo time to recharge. {"target_error_category": "POS Confusion", "corrected_sentence": "The service is good, the waiters serve excellently, the food is delicious, but some periods of the year the place is full of people and you need a reservation or to wait a long time for a table.", "task": {"type": "vocabulary_fill", "instruction_en": "Read the email below and fill in the blanks with the correct words from the word bank. Pay close attention to word forms, especially nouns and verbs that may be confused.", "content_en": {"context_text": "Dear Alex,

I hope you're doing well! I wanted to share my recent experience at the new Italian restaurant downtown. The service was excellent — the staff were friendly and always made sure we had everything we needed. The food was absolutely delicious, and I especially loved the pasta dishes. However, there’s one thing I noticed that could improve the overall experience: during peak hours, the place gets very crowded. Some guests have told me they’ve had to wait over an hour just to get seated. I think it would help if they offered more **_reservations_** instead of letting people walk in whenever they want. It’s not fair to those who arrive early and make a reservation. Also, sometimes the menu items are sold out quickly, so customers don’t even know what’s available until they arrive. I suggest adding a **_menu_** online so people can browse before coming. 

Another suggestion: maybe they could add a small **_bar_** area where people can relax while waiting. That way, customers wouldn’t feel rushed. I also noticed that the **_waiters_** sometimes forget to bring water, which is disappointing. I hope they start checking back after serving each table. 

Overall, the atmosphere is cozy, and I’d love to go back soon. Let me know when you’re free — I’d be happy to make a **_reservation_** together!

Best regards,
Jamie", "items": [], "word_bank": ["reservations", "menu", "bar", "waiters", "reservation"]}}}

{"target_error_category": "Transitive Verb", "corrected_sentence": "Participation in class by asking and answering questions demands more active thinking from us.", "task": {"type": "vocabulary_fill", "instruction_en": "Read the email below and fill in the blanks with the correct words from the word bank. I hope you're all doing well. I wanted to share some thoughts about how we can improve our participation in class. First, let me say that speaking up during discussions is not just about raising your hand—it’s about actively engaging with the material. Asking and answering **_questions_** helps us understand the topics better. Some students struggle because they don’t feel comfortable sharing their ideas. However, every contribution matters. Even small comments can lead to deeper thinking. We should avoid justifying our answers with “because” — instead, focus on explaining why you think so. Teachers appreciate when students connect ideas logically. Don’t forget to listen carefully when others speak. This builds respect and encourages open communication. Remember, good thinkers always ask **_questions_** and seek clarification. It’s also helpful to summarize what was said before adding your own point. This shows you were paying attention. Finally, don’t be afraid to admit when you’re unsure. Saying “I’m not sure” is better than guessing wrong. With practice, you’ll become more confident in **_answering_** and asking questions. Your active participation will help everyone learn more deeply.

Best regards,
Lena", "items": [{"question_en": "I wanted to share some thoughts about how we can improve our participation in class. The word 'Christian' originally meant 'follower of Christ,' emphasizing devotion and lifestyle over mere belief. Today, being a Christian involves more than attending church—it means living out the teachings of Jesus. This includes acts of kindness, compassion, and obedience. {"target_error_category": "Collocation", "corrected_sentence": "Well I'd like to talk to you about my experiences as an English student for many years.", "task": {"type": "vocabulary_fill", "instruction_en": "Read the email below and fill in the blanks with the correct words from the word bank. Use each word only once.", "content_en": {"context_text": "Hi Maria,\n\nI hope you're doing well. I wanted to share some thoughts about my journey as an English student for many years. It's been a challenging but rewarding experience. At first, I felt nervous about speaking in front of the class, but now I see it as an opportunity to grow. I’ve improved my writing skills a lot, especially when it comes to academic essays. I’ve learned to structure my ideas clearly and use proper grammar. I’ve also developed confidence in public speaking, which wasn’t easy at the beginning. I used to avoid group discussions, but now I look forward to them. I’ve made many friends who share my passion for language learning. We often meet to practice and discuss current events. I’ve also joined a language exchange program, which helps me improve my listening and speaking. I’ve attended several workshops on effective communication. They taught me about body language and how to respond quickly in conversations. I’ve started a blog to practice writing regularly. It’s helped me stay motivated. {"target_error_category": "Subject-Verb Agreement", "corrected_sentence": "Do we know what it means to be a friend?", "task": {"type": "vocabulary_fill", "instruction_en": "Read the email below and fill in the blanks with words from the word bank. I’ve recently joined a book club, and it’s been amazing. We meet every Friday, discuss books, and share our thoughts. It’s not about winning arguments, but about listening and understanding. Best,
Lena", "items": [{"question_en": "Hi Maya,

Another said that using multimedia makes lessons more engaging. She compared it to traditional frontal lessons, saying it’s like if students were in a classroom during a traditional frontal lesson, but with more visual support.

Best regards,

I remember last weekend — I went to the mall, but I couldn't find anything I liked. It felt like the store was designed ___2___ people who enjoy browsing. I ended up buying only one item, and even that felt like a chore. I think my personality ___3___ not suited for crowded shopping centers. I prefer quiet, peaceful places where I can focus. Maybe that's why I enjoy walking in the park more than going to the mall. I don't mind helping others, but I don't like being pushed or rushed. I value my alone time, and shopping doesn't always fit into that. I hope you understand — it's not about being rude, it's about personal preferences. I hope you don't mind if I take a break from shopping. I know you love it, but sometimes, you need to respect your own needs. I hope we can talk more about this soon. Let me know when you're free!

Best,

{"target_error_category": "Verb Tense", "corrected_sentence": "One thousand people of eighteen years and over were questioned in my town about their ways of taking.", "task": {"type": "functional_matching", "instruction_en": "Match each sentence with the correct verb tense explanation that identifies the error and explains why the past tense is needed.", "content_en": {"context_text": null, "items": [{"question_en": "1.
